career.a: Be the absolute best in the world at a useless skill
career.b: Be perfectly average at every single useful skill

career.a: Have a guaranteed government job with low stress
career.b: Launch a startup with a 50% chance of making millions

scifi.a: Time travel 100 years into the past
scifi.b: Time travel 100 years into the future

scifi.a: Find out that aliens are real and friendly
scifi.b: Find out that magic is real and you can learn it

scifi.a: Have a button that pauses time
scifi.b: Have a button that rewinds time by exactly 5 minutes

chaos.a: Have fingers as long as your legs
chaos.b: Have legs as short as your fingers

chaos.a: Every time you sneeze, you randomly teleport 10 feet
chaos.b: Every time you cough, a random person gets $5

deep.a: Know exactly WHEN you are going to die
deep.b: Know exactly HOW you are going to die

deep.a: Be remembered as a hero but die young
deep.b: Live a long, happy life but be completely forgotten

deep.a: Have the ability to read everyone's mind (cannot turn it off)
deep.b: Never be able to tell a lie again
